articles.title_en: Alibaba Establishes Token Foundry Division Under CEO Eddie Wu
articles.summary: 阿里巴巴合并通义大模型事业部和未来生活实验室，成立Token Foundry事业部，由集团CEO吴泳铭直接负责。周靖人转任首席科学家，牵头成立AI未来研究院。此次调整标志阿里大模型战略从研发走向商业化。
articles.summary_en: Alibaba merges Tongyi LLM division and Future Life Lab into Token Foundry, directly under CEO Eddie Wu. Zhou Jingren becomes Chief Scientist, leading the new AI Future Research Institute. This marks Alibaba's shift from R&D to commercialization in LLM strategy.
articles.content:
英伟达与SK海力士宣布建立多年技术合作伙伴关系，共同围绕AI工厂所需下一代内存展开研发，并将AI技术应用于半导体设计与制造流程。

SK海力士将为英伟达的Vera Rubin超级计算机协同开发专用内存产品。这一合作将加速AI计算硬件的性能提升。

两家公司还计划在AI辅助芯片设计领域展开合作，利用机器学习技术优化芯片架构和制造工艺。这代表了半导体行业智能化转型的重要方向。

分析认为，AI工厂对内存带宽和容量的需求正在快速增长，定制化内存解决方案将成为提升AI计算效率的关键因素。
articles.content_en:
NVIDIA and SK Hynix announced a multi-year technology partnership for joint R&D on next-generation memory for AI factories, applying AI technology to semiconductor design and manufacturing processes.

SK Hynix will co-develop specialized memory products for NVIDIA's Vera Rubin supercomputer. This collaboration will accelerate AI computing hardware performance improvements.

Both companies also plan to collaborate in AI-assisted chip design, using machine learning to optimize chip architecture and manufacturing processes. This represents an important direction for the semiconductor industry's intelligent transformation.

Analysis believes AI factories' growing demand for memory bandwidth and capacity is rapidly increasing, with customized memory solutions becoming key to improving AI computing efficiency.
key_points: 英伟达与SK海力士多年技术合作
联合开发AI工厂下一代内存
为Vera Rubin超算协同开发
AI辅助芯片设计合作
key_points_en: NVIDIA and SK Hynix multi-year tech partnership
Joint development of next-gen AI factory memory

articles.title: 英伟达与SK海力士达成多年技术合作，联合开发下一代AI内存
articles.title_en: NVIDIA and SK Hynix Announce Multi-Year Tech Partnership for Next-Gen AI Memory
articles.summary: 英伟达与SK海力士建立多年技术合作伙伴关系，围绕AI工厂所需下一代内存展开联合研发，并将AI技术应用于半导体设计与制造。SK海力士将为Vera Rubin超级计算机协同开发专用内存。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA and SK Hynix establish a multi-year technology partnership for next-gen AI factory memory R&D, and will apply AI to semiconductor design and manufacturing. SK Hynix will co-develop specialized memory for NVIDIA's Vera Rubin supercomputer.
articles.content:
微信正式面向开发者提供接入微信AI生态的能力，提供自动模式和开发模式两种接入选项。这一举措标志着微信AI能力向开发者全面开放。

自动模式需要开发者授权平台读取小程序源码，系统将自动为其配置AI能力。开发模式则提供更灵活的个性化开发接口。

目前该功能处于内测阶段，开发者需要申请加入内测名单才能体验。用户端的AI功能暂时无法使用。

微信表示，后续将逐步扩大内测范围，并在功能成熟后向全量用户开放。这一开放策略将极大丰富微信生态的AI应用场景。
articles.content_en:
WeChat officially opened AI ecosystem access to developers, providing automatic and development mode options. This move signals WeChat's AI capabilities are fully open to developers.

Auto mode requires developers to authorize the platform to read mini-program source code, with the system automatically configuring AI capabilities. Development mode provides more flexible personalized development interfaces.

Currently the feature is in beta, with developers needing to apply for beta access to experience it. End-user AI features are temporarily unavailable.

WeChat stated it will gradually expand the beta scope and fully open to all users once features mature. This open strategy will greatly enrich AI application scenarios in the WeChat ecosystem.
key_points: 微信开放AI生态接入开发者
提供自动和开发两种模式
当前处于内测阶段
将逐步扩大用户范围
key_points_en: WeChat opens AI ecosystem to developers
Will gradually expand to all users

articles.title: 微信面向开发者开放AI生态接入能力，内测阶段
articles.title_en: WeChat Opens AI Ecosystem Access to Developers, Currently in Beta
articles.summary: 微信正式面向开发者提供接入微信AI生态的能力，提供自动模式与开发模式两种选项。自动模式需授权平台读取小程序源码，开发模式支持个性化开发。当前处于内测阶段，用户暂时无法体验。
articles.summary_en: WeChat officially provides developers with access to its AI ecosystem, offering automatic and development modes. Auto mode requires authorizing platform to read mini-program source code; dev mode supports customization. Currently in beta, not yet available to end users.
articles.content:
三星正式宣布推进AI全面转型战略，代号AX。这项战略涵盖解除外部AI服务使用限制、搭建分层培训体系和制定业务整合目标等多个维度。

三星将为约2300名高管提供系统化AI培训，内容涵盖AI基础原理、应用场景和伦理规范等。培训采用分层递进的方式，确保各级管理者都能掌握必要的AI能力。

各子公司CEO被要求将AI融入八大核心业务链条，包括研发、生产、供应链、营销和服务等。三星全产业链的协同优势将在这场转型中得到充分发挥。

三星的全面AI转型反映了韩国科技产业对AI的高度重视。在存储、晶圆代工和先进封装等领域，三星的完整产业链布局将发挥关键作用。
articles.content_en:
Samsung officially announced its AI Transformation strategy, codenamed AX. This strategy covers multiple dimensions including lifting restrictions on external AI service usage, building tiered training systems, and setting business integration goals.

Samsung will provide systematic AI training for approximately 2,300 executives, covering AI fundamentals, application scenarios, and ethical guidelines. Training uses progressive layering to ensure managers at all levels master necessary AI capabilities.

Subsidiary CEOs are required to integrate AI across eight core business chains including R&D, production, supply chain, marketing, and services. Samsung's full-value-chain coordination advantages will be fully leveraged in this transformation.

Samsung's comprehensive AI transformation reflects the Korean tech industry's high regard for AI. Samsung's complete industry chain layout in memory, foundry, and advanced packaging will play a key role.
key_points: 三星正式推进AI全面转型
为2300名高管提供AI培训
要求融入八大核心业务链
全产业链协同发力
key_points_en: Required integration across 8 core business chains

articles.title: 三星全面启动AI大转型，全业务全层级拥抱人工智能
articles.title_en: Samsung Launches Full-Scale AI Transformation Across All Businesses and Levels
articles.summary: 三星正式官宣推进AI全面转型（AX），解除外部AI服务使用限制，搭建分层培训体系面向2300名高管开展AI集训，要求各子公司CEO将AI融入八大核心业务链条。存储、晶圆代工、先进封装完整产业链协同发力。
articles.summary_en: Samsung officially announces AI Transformation (AX), lifting restrictions on external AI services, building tiered training for 2,300 executives, and requiring subsidiary CEOs to integrate AI across eight core business chains. Full value chain from memory to foundry to advanced packaging.
articles.content:
WWDC 2026确认Siri AI和Apple Intelligence新功能在中国大陆暂不提供。这一决定需要配合监管要求进行调整，但具体时间表尚未公布。

与此同时，华为、小米、vivo等国产品牌正在加速AI布局，在国内市场展开激烈竞争。数据显示，华为以20%市场份额重回中国智能手机市场第一。

苹果封闭的生态系统在AI时代面临挑战。缺乏开放的AI生态使得苹果在中国市场难以与本地竞争对手匹敌。

分析认为，苹果需要找到符合中国监管要求的AI发展路径，与本地企业合作可能成为重要选项。中国市场对苹果的重要性不容忽视。
articles.content_en:
WWDC 2026 confirmed Siri AI and new Apple Intelligence features are not available in mainland China. This decision requires adjustment to comply with regulatory requirements, though specific timelines remain undisclosed.

Meanwhile, domestic brands including Huawei, Xiaomi, and vivo are accelerating AI deployment, competing fiercely in the domestic market. Data shows Huawei regained the #1 position in China's smartphone market with 20% share.

Apple's closed ecosystem faces challenges in the AI era. Lack of an open AI ecosystem makes it difficult for Apple to compete with local rivals in China.

Analysis believes Apple needs to find an AI development path compliant with Chinese regulatory requirements. Partnerships with local enterprises may become an important option. The importance of the Chinese market to Apple cannot be ignored.
key_points: WWDC确认Siri AI在中国暂不提供
需配合监管要求推进
华为以20%份额重回中国市场第一
苹果封闭生态在AI时代面临挑战
key_points_en: WWDC confirms Siri AI not available in China
Apple's closed ecosystem faces AI era challenges

articles.title: 苹果AI落地中国再延期，Siri AI暂不提供
articles.title_en: Apple AI Delayed Again in China, Siri AI Not Available
articles.summary: WWDC 2026确认Siri AI和Apple Intelligence新功能在中国大陆暂不提供，需配合监管要求推进。华为、小米、vivo等国产品牌加速AI布局，华为Q1以20%份额重回中国第一。苹果封闭生态在AI时代面临挑战。
articles.summary_en: WWDC 2026 confirms Siri AI and new Apple Intelligence features not available in mainland China pending regulatory requirements. Huawei, Xiaomi, vivo accelerate AI deployment. Huawei regained #1 in China with 20% market share in Q1. Apple's closed ecosystem faces challenges in the AI era.
articles.content:
智谱华章宣布拟在科创板上市，计划募资不超过150亿元，其中120亿元将投入通用基座大模型项目。这一IPO计划标志着中国AI独角兽正式冲刺资本市场。

MiniMax同日签署辅导协议启动A股IPO进程。两大AI独角兽的上市步伐形成呼应，AI公司IPO潮持续升温。

燧原科技和粤芯半导体的科创板和创业板IPO将于6月15日上会。这两家半导体公司的上市将进一步完善中国AI产业链的资本布局。

市场分析认为，中国AI企业密集冲刺IPO反映了行业发展进入成熟期，资本市场对AI长期价值的认可度持续提升。
articles.content_en:
Zhipu AI announced plans to list on the STAR Market, planning to raise up to 15 billion yuan, with 12 billion allocated to general foundation LLM projects. This IPO plan marks Chinese AI unicorns officially sprinting toward the capital market.

MiniMax signed a counseling agreement on the same day to start its A-share IPO process. The coordinated IPO pace of these two AI unicorns signals sustained momentum in the AI company IPO wave.

Suiyuan Technology and Yuexin Semiconductor's STAR Market and ChiNext IPOs are scheduled for review on June 15. These two semiconductor companies' listings will further improve Chinese AI industry chain capital deployment.

Market analysis believes Chinese AI companies' intensive IPO sprinting reflects the industry's entry into a mature phase, with capital markets' recognition of AI's long-term value continuously improving.
key_points: 智谱冲刺科创板募资150亿
MiniMax同步启动A股IPO
120亿投入通用基座大模型
AI企业IPO潮持续升温
key_points_en: Zhipu targets STAR Market, raising 15B yuan
AI company IPO wave continues heating up

articles.title: 中国AI企业加速IPO：智谱冲刺科创板募资150亿，MiniMax启动上市辅导

articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI announces plans to list on STAR Market, raising up to 15 billion yuan with 12 billion for foundation LLM projects. MiniMax signs counseling agreement for A-share IPO. Suiyuan Technology and Yuexin Semiconductor IPO reviews scheduled for June 15.
articles.content:
京东与腾讯宣布围绕AI Agent展开深度合作。双方将依托京东的商品供应链和履约服务能力，结合腾讯的生态入口优势，共同打造跨场景智能化服务。

合作将推动AI Agent从单点应用走向生态协同。京东的零售场景与腾讯的社交、支付场景深度融合，将为用户提供无缝衔接的智能体验。

具体应用场景包括智能购物助手、个性化推荐和自动化客服等。通过AI Agent，用户可以在腾讯生态内直接完成从发现到购买的完整流程。

业界认为，这一合作代表了AI Agent商业化落地的的重要方向。平台间的协同将释放更大的商业价值。
articles.content_en:
JD.com and Tencent announced deep collaboration on AI Agents. The partnership leverages JD's product supply chain and fulfillment capabilities combined with Tencent's ecosystem advantages to jointly create cross-scenario intelligent services.

The collaboration will drive AI Agents from point solutions to ecosystem coordination. Deep integration of JD's retail scenarios with Tencent's social and payment scenarios will provide users with seamless intelligent experiences.

Specific application scenarios include smart shopping assistants, personalized recommendations, and automated customer service. Through AI Agents, users can complete the entire discovery-to-purchase process directly within Tencent's ecosystem.

Industry observers believe this collaboration represents an important direction for AI Agent commercialization. Cross-platform coordination will unlock greater commercial value.
key_points: 京东与腾讯AI Agent深度合作
零售与社交支付场景融合
AI Agent从单点走向生态协同
平台协同释放商业价值
key_points_en: JD.com and Tencent deep AI Agent collaboration
AI Agents evolving from point to ecosystem

articles.title: 京东与腾讯就AI Agent达成深度合作
articles.title_en: JD.com and Tencent Announce Deep AI Agent Collaboration
articles.summary: 京东与腾讯将围绕AI Agent展开深度合作，依托京东商品供应链和履约服务能力及腾讯生态入口优势，共同打造跨场景智能化服务新范式，推动AI Agent从单点应用走向生态协同。
articles.summary_en: JD.com and Tencent will collaborate on AI Agents, leveraging JD's supply chain and fulfillment capabilities plus Tencent's ecosystem reach to create cross-scenario intelligent services, pushing AI Agents from point solutions to ecosystem coordination.
articles.content:
英伟达宣布开始出货与台积电联合开发的下一代共封装光学交换机。这一技术突破旨在解决AI数据中心面临的数据传输和功耗挑战。

共封装光学技术将光学元件直接集成到芯片封装中，大幅缩短电信号传输距离，提升带宽同时降低功耗。这一技术对AI大模型训练至关重要。

COMPUTEX 2026成为CPO技术从概念验证转向大规模量产的重要节点。英伟达表示，将在未来几个季度内扩大产能以满足市场需求。

台积电在先进封装领域的持续创新为CPO技术的实现提供了关键支撑。这一合作展现了半导体产业链协同创新的模式。
articles.content_en:
NVIDIA announced shipment of next-generation co-packaged optics switches co-developed with TSMC. This technology breakthrough addresses AI data center challenges in data transmission and power consumption.

Co-packaged optics technology integrates optical components directly into chip packages, significantly shortening electrical signal transmission distances while increasing bandwidth and reducing power consumption. This technology is crucial for large AI model training.

Computex 2026 became an important node for CPO technology transitioning from proof-of-concept to large-scale production. NVIDIA stated it will expand production capacity in coming quarters to meet market demand.

TSMC's continuous innovation in advanced packaging provides key support for CPO technology's realization. This collaboration demonstrates the semiconductor industry chain's collaborative innovation model.
key_points: 英伟达开始出货CPO交换机
与台积电联合开发解决传输瓶颈
COMPUTEX标志CPO规模量产
AI数据中心功耗问题获突破
key_points_en: Joint development with TSMC solves transmission bottlenecks
Breakthrough in AI data center power challenges

articles.title: 英伟达开始出货与台积电合作的CPO交换机，解决AI数据中心瓶颈
articles.title_en: NVIDIA Starts Shipping TSMC-Co-Developed CPO Switches to Tackle AI Data Center Bottlenecks
articles.summary: 英伟达宣布开始出货与台积电联合开发的下一代共封装光学（CPO）交换机，旨在解决AI数据中心的数据传输和功耗挑战。COMPUTEX 2026标志着CPO从概念验证转向超大规模量产部署。

articles.content:
中国AI创业公司阶跃星辰准备最早于本周提交香港IPO申请，目标估值120亿美元。若成功上市，将成为近年香港最大的科技上市项目之一。

阶跃星辰由前字节跳动高管创立，专注于大模型研发。公司已推出Step系列大模型，在中文理解和生成方面表现优异。

港股市场对中国AI公司的欢迎程度正在提升。分析师认为，香港作为国际金融中心的地位有利于AI公司获得国际资本关注。

IPO募集的资金将主要用于算力基础设施建设和人才招聘。阶跃星辰希望借助资本力量加速追赶行业头部企业。
articles.content_en:
Chinese AI startup StepFun is preparing to file for a Hong Kong IPO as early as this week, targeting a $12 billion valuation. If successful, it would become one of the largest tech listings in Hong Kong in recent years.

StepFun was founded by former ByteDance executives, focusing on large model R&D. The company has released the Step series large models, performing excellently in Chinese comprehension and generation.

Hong Kong's welcome for Chinese AI companies is increasing. Analysts believe Hong Kong's status as an international financial center benefits AI companies seeking international capital attention.

IPO-raised funds will primarily be used for compute infrastructure construction and talent recruitment. StepFun hopes to leverage capital to accelerate catching up with industry leaders.
key_points: 阶跃星辰寻求120亿美元估值赴港IPO
近年香港最大科技上市项目之一
专注大模型研发中文能力突出
资金用于算力和人才
key_points_en: StepFun seeks $12B valuation in HK IPO
One of Hong Kong's largest tech listings
Focuses on LLMs, strong Chinese capabilities
Funds for compute infrastructure and talent

articles.title: StepFun（阶跃星辰）寻求120亿美元估值赴港IPO
articles.title_en: StepFun Seeks $12 Billion Valuation in Hong Kong IPO
articles.summary: 中国AI创业公司阶跃星辰（StepFun）准备最早于本周一提交香港IPO申请，有望成为近年香港最大的科技上市项目之一。这是中国AI企业密集冲刺资本市场的最新案例。
articles.summary_en: Chinese AI startup StepFun is preparing to file for a Hong Kong IPO as early as Monday, potentially becoming one of the city's largest tech listings in recent years, at a targeted $12 billion valuation.
articles.content:
阶跃星辰最新一轮融资获得超过10亿美元资金支持，投资方包括多家知名VC和产业资本。新估值较半年前增长近三倍。

公司近期的快速成长得益于产品落地和商业化进展。Step系列模型已获得多家企业和政府机构的采用。

阶跃星辰还在近期发布了多模态模型Step-Video和语音模型Step-Audio，进一步完善产品矩阵。这些新产品的推出显示了公司的技术迭代能力。

充足的弹药将支撑阶跃星辰在算力、人才和应用场景拓展上持续投入。公司表示，将坚持技术驱动的发展路线。
articles.content_en:
StepFun's latest funding round received over $1 billion from multiple well-known VCs and industrial capital. The new valuation represents nearly triple growth compared to half a year ago.

The company's recent rapid growth stems from product deployment and commercialization progress. The Step series models have been adopted by multiple enterprises and government institutions.

StepFun recently released multimodal model Step-Video and voice model Step-Audio, further improving the product portfolio. These new product launches demonstrate the company's technology iteration capability.

Sufficient funding will support StepFun's continued investment in compute, talent, and application scenario expansion. The company stated it will adhere to a technology-driven development path.
key_points: 阶跃星辰获得超10亿美元融资
新估值较半年前增长近三倍
产品和商业化取得快速进展
发布多模态和语音模型
key_points_en: New valuation triples in half a year
Rapid progress in products and commercialization

hero.title: 苹果WWDC 2026：Siri重生为AI超级应用，ChatGPT时代走向终结
hero.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026: Siri Reborn as AI Superapp, ChatGPT Era Comes to an End
hero.summary: 苹果在WWDC 2026上发布史上最大Siri重构——基于Gemini模型的全新AI助手以独立App形式亮相，支持跨应用操作与屏幕感知。同时OpenAI高管直言「Chat is Dead」，ChatGPT正转型为AI智能体超级应用。两大消费AI巨头同步转向，标志着聊天机器人时代的终结与AI智能体时代的全面开启。
hero.summary_en: Apple unveiled the biggest Siri overhaul in history at WWDC 2026 — a Gemini-powered AI assistant launching as a standalone app with cross-app actions and screen awareness. Meanwhile, OpenAI declared 'Chat is Dead,' pivoting ChatGPT into an AI agent superapp. Two consumer AI giants simultaneously shifting signals the end of the chatbot era and the dawn of AI agents.
hero.content:
苹果在WWDC 2026上发布了史上最大规模的Siri重构计划。全新的AI助手基于Gemini模型开发，以独立应用的形式推出，支持跨应用操作和屏幕感知等先进功能。

这一战略举措标志着苹果正式从语音助手向多模态AI能力全面转型。Siri不再局限于简单的问答，而是成为能够理解并操作手机界面的智能助手。

与此同时，OpenAI高管公开宣称「Chat is Dead」，表示ChatGPT正在从对话工具向AI Agent超级应用转型。两大消费AI巨头同步转向，昭示着AI行业进入新阶段。

业界分析认为，聊天机器人时代正在终结，AI Agent时代全面开启。未来的AI竞争将围绕智能体执行能力和生态系统整合能力展开。
hero.content_en:
Apple unveiled the biggest Siri overhaul in history at WWDC 2026. The new AI assistant, built on the Gemini model, launches as a standalone app supporting cross-app actions and screen awareness capabilities.

This strategic move marks Apple's official transition from voice assistant to comprehensive multimodal AI capabilities. Siri is no longer limited to simple Q&A but becomes an intelligent assistant capable of understanding and operating phone interfaces.

Meanwhile, OpenAI executives publicly declared 'Chat is Dead,' stating ChatGPT is transitioning from conversational tool to AI Agent superapp. Two consumer AI giants simultaneously pivoting signals the AI industry entering a new phase.

Industry analysis believes the chatbot era is ending and the AI Agent era is fully beginning. Future AI competition will revolve around agent execution capabilities and ecosystem integration capabilities.
key_points: 苹果发布史上最大Siri重构
基于Gemini的独立AI助手应用
OpenAI宣告Chat已死
AI Agent时代全面开启
key_points_en: Apple unveils biggest Siri overhaul ever

articles.title: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI：AI行业的「大烟草时刻」正式到来
articles.title_en: Florida Sues OpenAI: AI's Big Tobacco Moment Has Arrived
articles.summary: 佛罗里达州成为首个起诉OpenAI的美国州，提交83页诉状指控ChatGPT是危险且令人上瘾的产品，对儿童进行欺骗性营销。州总检察长寻求追究CEO Sam Altman个人责任，罚款可能高达数十亿美元。同一周，加州法院将12起针对OpenAI的产品责任案合并审理。法院已拒绝AI公司的Section 230抗辩——AI输出不是「用户内容」，社交媒体二十年的法律保护伞不适用。
articles.summary_en: Florida became the first US state to sue OpenAI, filing an 83-page complaint alleging ChatGPT is a dangerous, addictive product marketed deceptively as safe for children. The AG seeks to hold CEO Sam Altman personally liable, with potential penalties in the billions. Courts rejected Section 230 defenses for chatbots — AI outputs aren't user content, so the legal shield protecting social media for decades doesn't apply.
articles.content:
佛罗里达州正式对OpenAI提起诉讼，成为美国首个起诉AI公司的州。这份长达83页的诉状指控ChatGPT是危险且令人上瘾的产品，对未成年人进行欺骗性营销。

州总检察长在诉讼中寻求追究CEO奥特曼的个人责任，并要求数十亿美元的罚款和赔偿。诉讼的核心论点是OpenAI明知产品风险却故意隐瞒。

就在同一周，加州法院将12起针对OpenAI的产品责任案件合并审理。法院已驳回AI公司关于Section 230免责保护的抗辩。

法律专家指出，这一裁决确立了重要先例：AI聊天机器人的输出不属于「用户内容」，因此不享受社交媒体二十年来享有的法律保护。AI行业正面临「大烟草时刻」。
articles.content_en:
Florida officially sued OpenAI, becoming the first US state to sue an AI company. The 83-page complaint alleges ChatGPT is a dangerous, addictive product marketed deceptively to children.

The state attorney general seeks personal liability for CEO Altman and billions in fines and damages. The core argument is OpenAI knowingly concealed product risks.

In the same week, California courts consolidated 12 product liability cases against OpenAI. Courts rejected AI companies' Section 230 defense arguments.

Legal experts note this ruling establishes an important precedent: AI chatbot outputs don't constitute 'user content,' so they don't enjoy the legal shield social media has enjoyed for two decades. The AI industry is facing its 'Big Tobacco moment.'
key_points: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI
ChatGPT被指危险且令人上瘾
寻求追究奥特曼个人责任
Section 230保护不适用AI
key_points_en: ChatGPT accused of being dangerous and addictive
Section 230 protection doesn't apply to AI

articles.title: 谷歌签约SpaceX：每月9.2亿美元租用xAI算力，创科技史上最大基础设施租赁
articles.title_en: Google Signs $920M/Month Deal with SpaceX for xAI Compute, Largest Infrastructure Lease in Tech History
articles.summary: 谷歌与SpaceX签署32个月协议，每月支付9.2亿美元租用xAI约11万块Nvidia GPU，用于Gemini Enterprise的算力需求。Anthropic上月也与SpaceX签署类似协议。两笔交易均在SpaceX IPO前达成，后者目标估值超1.75万亿美元。谷歌同时将年度资本支出预测上调至1800-1900亿美元。
articles.summary_en: Google signed a 32-month deal paying SpaceX $920M/month for access to roughly 110,000 Nvidia GPUs in xAI's data centers. Anthropic signed a similar deal last month. Both come ahead of SpaceX's IPO targeting $1.75T+ valuation. Google revised its capex forecast to $180-190B for the year.
articles.content:
谷歌与SpaceX签署了一份史无前例的算力租赁协议。根据协议，谷歌将在32个月内每月支付9.2亿美元，租用xAI约11万块英伟达GPU。

这笔交易的总价值接近300亿美元，成为科技行业有史以来最大的单一基础设施租赁协议。Anthropic上月也与SpaceX签署了类似协议。

这些交易都在SpaceX IPO前达成，后者的目标估值超过1.75万亿美元。市场认为，SpaceX正通过算力租赁锁定大客户，为IPO估值背书。

谷歌同时将全年资本支出预测上调至1800至1900亿美元，反映出科技巨头对AI基础设施的持续投入。
articles.content_en:
Google signed an unprecedented compute leasing agreement with SpaceX. Under the deal, Google will pay $920 million monthly over 32 months for access to approximately 110,000 Nvidia GPUs in xAI's data centers.

This deal's total value approaches $30 billion, making it the largest single infrastructure lease in tech history. Anthropic signed a similar agreement with SpaceX last month.

Both deals were reached ahead of SpaceX's IPO, which targets a valuation exceeding $1.75 trillion. The market believes SpaceX is locking in major clients to endorse its IPO valuation.

Google simultaneously revised its full-year capital expenditure forecast to $180-190 billion, reflecting tech giants' continued investment in AI infrastructure.
key_points: 谷歌每月9.2亿美元租xAI算力
32个月近300亿美元总价值
SpaceX IPO前锁定大客户
谷歌资本支出预测上调1900亿
key_points_en: SpaceX locks in clients before IPO

articles.title: 小米MiMo突破万亿参数千token/秒：速度即智能的新范式
articles.title_en: Xiaomi MiMo Breaks 1,000 Tokens/Second on Trillion-Parameter Model: Speed Becomes Intelligence
articles.summary: 小米发布MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed，在单台8卡通用GPU节点上实现万亿参数MoE模型1000+ token/s解码速度。突破来自FP4量化+DFlash推测解码+TileRT模型系统协同设计。小米提出「速度即智能」论：在1000 tps下可在相同壁钟时间并行运行数十条推理路径，从「想更久」转向「同时想多次」。
articles.summary_en: Xiaomi released MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, achieving 1,000+ tokens/second on a 1-trillion-parameter MoE model using a single 8-GPU commodity node. The breakthrough comes from FP4 quantization + DFlash speculative decoding + TileRT codesign. Xiaomi argues speed becomes intelligence: at 1,000 tps you can run dozens of parallel reasoning paths simultaneously.
articles.content:
小米发布MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed模型，在单台8卡通用GPU节点上实现了万亿参数MoE模型每秒1000 Token以上的解码速度。

这一突破源于FP4量化、DFlash推测解码和TileRT模型系统协同设计等多项技术创新。小米提出的「速度即智能」理念引发业界讨论。

小米认为，在1000 tps的生成速度下，AI可以在相同的壁钟时间内并行运行数十条推理路径，从「想更久」转向「同时想多次」。这一范式转变可能重塑AI应用的可能性边界。

该技术已在小米内部产品中得到应用验证，未来将逐步向外部开发者开放。
articles.content_en:
Xiaomi released MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, achieving over 1,000 tokens per second decoding speed for a 1-trillion-parameter MoE model on a single 8-GPU commodity node.

This breakthrough stems from multiple technological innovations including FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and TileRT co-design. Xiaomi's proposed 'speed becomes intelligence' concept sparked industry discussion.

Xiaomi argues that at 1,000 tps generation speed, AI can run dozens of parallel reasoning paths within the same wall-clock time, shifting from 'thinking longer' to 'thinking multiple times simultaneously.' This paradigm shift could reshape the possibilities of AI applications.

The technology has been validated in Xiaomi's internal products and will gradually open to external developers.
key_points: 小米MiMo突破1000 token/秒
万亿参数MoE模型单节点运行
提出速度即智能新范式
从想更久转向同时想多次
key_points_en: Trillion-parameter MoE runs on single node
Shifts from thinking longer to multiple thoughts

articles.title: OpenAI宣告「Chat已死」：ChatGPT转型AI智能体超级应用
articles.title_en: OpenAI Declares Chat is Dead: ChatGPT Overhauls into AI Agent Superapp
articles.summary: OpenAI正计划对ChatGPT进行自创办以来最重大改版，从对话助手转型为整合编码工具、AI智能体与第三方应用的综合平台。一名资深员工对金融时报直言「Chat is Dead」。转型由营收压力驱动——ChatGPT超10亿用户中大部分免费使用，OpenAI需在IPO前证明变现能力。企业用户已占营收40%，目标年底达50%。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI is planning a major ChatGPT overhaul focused on AI agents and coding tools, redirecting users to higher-value products. A senior employee told the Financial Times: 'Chat is dead.' The pivot is driven by revenue pressure — most of ChatGPT's 1B+ users are free, and OpenAI needs to prove monetisation ahead of IPO. Business users already account for 40% of revenue.
articles.content:
OpenAI正在筹划ChatGPT自创办以来最重大的改版，从对话助手转型为整合编码工具、AI Agent和第三方应用的综合平台。这一战略转型的信号来自公司内部的深度调整。

一位资深员工对金融时报表示：「Chat is Dead」。这句话被业界解读为AI行业从聊天机器人时代向智能体时代转变的宣言。

这一转型由营收压力驱动。ChatGPT拥有超过10亿用户，但大部分是免费用户。OpenAI需要在IPO前证明其变现能力，而企业用户已贡献40%营收。

OpenAI正在将用户引导至高价值产品，包括API服务和Agent平台。这一策略调整反映了AI商业化的核心逻辑：从用户规模转向用户价值。
articles.content_en:
OpenAI is planning the most significant ChatGPT overhaul since founding, transitioning from conversational assistant to a comprehensive platform integrating coding tools, AI Agents, and third-party applications. This strategic pivot signals internal deep adjustments.

A senior employee told the Financial Times: 'Chat is dead.' The industry interprets this as a declaration of the AI industry's transition from the chatbot era to the Agent era.

This pivot is driven by revenue pressure. ChatGPT has over 1 billion users, but most are free users. OpenAI needs to prove monetization capability ahead of IPO, while enterprise users already contribute 40% of revenue.

OpenAI is redirecting users toward high-value products including API services and Agent platforms. This strategic adjustment reflects the core logic of AI commercialization: shifting from user scale to user value.
key_points: OpenAI筹划ChatGPT最重大改版
Chat is Dead宣示新时代
超10亿用户但大部分免费
目标年底企业收入占比50%
key_points_en: Chat is Dead declares new era

articles.title: 欧盟再次推迟AI法案关键义务：高风险系统合规延至2027年底
articles.title_en: EU Delays Key AI Act Obligations Again: High-Risk Compliance Pushed to Late 2027
articles.summary: 布鲁塞尔第二次推迟欧盟AI法案关键义务。高风险系统义务独立设备延至2027年12月，嵌入产品延至2028年8月，作为数字综合简化方案的一部分。原因包括：企业无法清晰分类高风险系统、成员国准备不足、欧洲担忧监管拖慢AI发展。操纵性AI禁令自2025年2月起已生效，风险金字塔结构保持不变。
articles.summary_en: Brussels delayed key obligations under the EU AI Act for the second time. High-risk system obligations pushed to December 2027 (stand-alone) and August 2028 (embedded in products). Reasons: businesses can't classify high-risk systems clearly, member states lack readiness, and Europe fears regulation is slowing its AI sector versus the US and China.
articles.content:
布鲁塞尔第二次推迟欧盟AI法案关键义务的执行期限。高风险AI系统的独立设备合规期限延至2027年12月，嵌入产品中的AI系统延至2028年8月。

监管机构解释称，企业难以清晰界定高风险AI系统的范围，各成员国的执行准备也不充分。欧洲担忧过度监管会拖慢其AI发展相对于美国和中国的步伐。

值得注意的是，操纵性AI禁令自2025年2月起已生效，这一风险金字塔结构保持不变。法案的核心框架并未松动。

批评者认为，反复推迟损害了法案的公信力。支持者则表示，给予企业更多适应时间是务实之举。
articles.content_en:
Brussels delayed key EU AI Act obligations for the second time. High-risk AI system compliance for stand-alone devices pushed to December 2027, and for embedded systems to August 2028.

Regulators explained businesses struggle to clearly define high-risk AI systems, and member states lack adequate implementation readiness. Europe fears excessive regulation will slow its AI development relative to the US and China.

Notably, the manipulative AI ban effective since February 2025 remains unchanged, with the risk pyramid structure intact. The act's core framework hasn't loosened.

Critics argue repeated delays damage the regulation's credibility. Supporters say giving businesses more adaptation time is pragmatic.
key_points: 欧盟第二次推迟AI法案义务
高风险系统合规延至2027-2028
企业难以界定高风险范围
担忧拖慢欧洲AI发展
key_points_en: EU delays AI Act obligations for second time
Businesses struggle to define high-risk scope
Concerns over slowing European AI development

articles.title: 英国Cosine联合BT、汇丰、BAE等打造首个主权前沿AI模型Lumen
articles.title_en: UK's Cosine Builds Britain's First Sovereign Frontier AI Model with BT, HSBC, BAE
articles.summary: 英国初创公司Cosine组建包括BT、汇丰、劳埃德、BAE系统等在内的联盟，在布里斯托Isambard-AI超算上完全训练Lumen Sovereign模型，目标2026年底部署。其编码模型已连续两年在独立基准测试中超越OpenAI和Anthropic，还支持COBOL、Fortran、Ada等国防和金融系统传统语言。首相斯塔默在伦敦科技周宣布4亿英镑新AI芯片投入。
articles.summary_en: UK startup Cosine assembled BT, HSBC, BAE Systems and others to build Lumen Sovereign — trained entirely on the Isambard-AI supercomputer in Bristol, targeting deployment by end of 2026. Its coding models have topped independent benchmarks against OpenAI and Anthropic for two years, including support for COBOL, Fortran, and Ada. PM Starmer announced £400M new AI chip spending at London Tech Week.
articles.content:
英国初创公司Cosine宣布组建包括BT、汇丰、劳埃德银行、BAE系统在内的联盟，在布里斯托Isambard-AI超算上完全训练英国首个主权前沿AI模型Lumen。

Cosine此前推出的编码模型已连续两年在独立基准测试中超越OpenAI和Anthropic。该模型还支持COBOL、Fortran、Ada等传统编程语言，这些语言在国防和金融系统中仍有广泛应用。

首相斯塔默在伦敦科技周宣布投入4亿英镑用于AI芯片建设。这笔投资将支持Lumen等主权AI项目的发展。

英国希望通过主权AI战略减少对外国AI技术的依赖，同时确保国家安全和战略自主。这一模式可能为其他国家提供参考。
articles.content_en:
UK startup Cosine announced assembling a consortium including BT, HSBC, Lloyds, and BAE Systems to train Britain's first sovereign frontier AI model Lumen entirely on the Isambard-AI supercomputer in Bristol.

Cosine's coding models have topped independent benchmarks against OpenAI and Anthropic for two years. The model also supports COBOL, Fortran, and Ada — programming languages still widely used in defense and financial systems.

PM Starmer announced £400 million in AI chip investment at London Tech Week. This investment will support sovereign AI projects like Lumen.

Britain hopes its sovereign AI strategy will reduce dependence on foreign AI technology while ensuring national security and strategic autonomy. This model may provide reference for other countries.
key_points: 英国组建联盟打造Lumen主权AI模型
在Isambard-AI超算上完全训练
Cosine编码模型连续两年超越OpenAI
4亿英镑AI芯片投资
key_points_en: UK builds consortium for Lumen sovereign AI model
Cosine coding models beat OpenAI for two years

articles.title: 黄仁勋扩大英伟达韩国AI合作：现代、三星、SK加入主权AI阵营
articles.title_en: Jensen Huang Expands NVIDIA's Korea AI Partnerships: Hyundai, Samsung, SK Join Sovereign AI Camp
articles.summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋在韩国AI峰会上宣布扩大合作伙伴关系，新增现代、三星、SK、Naver、Doosan。合作涵盖主权AI模型（EXAONE在Blackwell GPU上运行）、人形机器人（Isaac GR00T）、自动驾驶和GPU云服务。现代集团会长郑义宣与黄仁勋两度会面，讨论物理AI合作。英伟达和LG集团还宣布共建AI工厂。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang announced expanded AI partnerships at Korea's AI summit, adding Hyundai, Samsung, SK, Naver, and Doosan. Deals span sovereign AI models (EXAONE on Blackwell GPUs), humanoid robotics (Isaac GR00T), autonomous driving, and GPU cloud services. NVIDIA and LG Group also announced building an AI factory together.
articles.content:
英伟达CEO黄仁勋在韩国AI峰会上宣布扩大合作伙伴关系，新增现代、三星、SK、Naver、Doosan等韩国头部企业。合作范围涵盖主权AI模型、人形机器人、自动驾驶和GPU云服务等领域。

在主权AI方面，EXAONE模型将在英伟达Blackwell GPU上运行。人形机器人合作基于Isaac GR00T平台，面向未来工厂和家庭应用场景。

现代集团会长郑义宣与黄仁勋两度会面，讨论物理AI领域的深度合作。此外，英伟达和LG集团还宣布将共建AI工厂。

英伟达正通过与各国头部企业的合作，构建覆盖全球的AI生态系统。这种「合纵连横」策略有助于其在AI时代保持领先地位。
articles.content_en:
NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang announced expanded partnerships at Korea's AI summit, adding Hyundai, Samsung, SK, Naver, and Doosan. Collaboration spans sovereign AI models, humanoid robotics, autonomous driving, and GPU cloud services.

In sovereign AI, EXAONE will run on NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. Humanoid robotics collaboration uses the Isaac GR00T platform for future factory and home application scenarios.

Hyundai Group Chairman Chung Euisun met with Huang twice, discussing deep collaboration in physical AI. Additionally, NVIDIA and LG Group announced plans to jointly build an AI factory.

NVIDIA is building a global AI ecosystem through partnerships with leading enterprises in various countries. This strategy helps maintain its leading position in the AI era.
key_points: 英伟达扩大韩国AI合作
新增现代三星SK等合作伙伴
主权AI人形机器人和自动驾驶
与LG共建AI工厂
key_points_en: Sovereign AI, humanoid robotics, autonomous driving

articles.title: 月之暗面(Moonshot AI)寻求300亿美元估值：六个月内第三轮融资
articles.title_en: Moonshot AI Seeks $30 Billion Valuation in Third Funding Round Within Six Months
articles.summary: 中国AI初创公司月之暗面(Moonshot AI)启动新一轮融资，计划筹集至多20亿美元，投后估值预计达300亿美元。这是该公司六个月内第三轮融资，估值从2025年12月的40亿美元飙升至当前目标。月之暗面4月年化收入突破2亿美元，正重组离岸架构以筹备港股上市。旗下Kimi智能体产品Kimi Work已上线。
articles.summary_en: Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI is seeking up to $2B in new funding at a $30B valuation — its third round in six months, with valuation soaring from just over $4B in December 2025. ARR topped $200M in April. The company is restructuring its offshore governance for a Hong Kong IPO and recently launched the Kimi Work AI agent.
articles.content:
中国AI初创公司月之暗面启动新一轮融资，计划筹集至多20亿美元，估值预计达到300亿美元。这是该公司六个月内第三轮融资，估值从去年12月的40亿美元飙升至当前目标。

月之暗面旗下Kimi智能助手产品表现强劲，4月年化收入已突破2亿美元。公司近期还推出了Kimi Work AI Agent产品，进一步拓展商业化场景。

消息人士透露，月之暗面正在重组离岸架构，为赴港股上市做准备。快速增长的估值和收入将为其IPO提供有力支撑。

投资者对月之暗面的热情反映了市场对中国AI企业的持续看好。Kimi在中文语境下的优势使其在国际竞争中占据差异化地位。
articles.content_en:
Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI is seeking up to $2 billion in new funding at an expected valuation of $30 billion. This is the company's third funding round in six months, with valuation soaring from just over $4 billion in December.

Moonshot AI's Kimi assistant product has shown strong performance, with April annual recurring revenue exceeding $200 million. The company recently launched Kimi Work AI Agent product, further expanding commercialization scenarios.

Sources say Moonshot AI is restructuring its offshore governance for a Hong Kong listing. Rapidly growing valuation and revenue will provide strong support for its IPO.

Investor enthusiasm for Moonshot AI reflects continued market optimism about Chinese AI companies. Kimi's advantages in Chinese context give it a differentiated position in international competition.

articles.title: GitHub Copilot桌面应用发布：AI编码从助手升级为自主智能体
articles.title_en: GitHub Copilot Desktop App Launches: AI Coding Upgrades from Assistant to Autonomous Agent
articles.summary: GitHub发布Copilot桌面应用技术预览版，作为AI智能体驱动开发的专属工作空间。支持并行工作流、GitHub集成和PR生命周期管理，适用于macOS、Windows和Linux。这标志着AI编码从编辑器内的辅助工具，升级为管理自身工作流的独立智能体，开发者角色从写代码转向监督智能体写代码。
articles.summary_en: GitHub launched a desktop Copilot app (technical preview) as a dedicated home for agent-driven development. Supports parallel workstreams, GitHub integration, and PR lifecycle management. Available on macOS, Windows, and Linux. This signals AI coding graduating from assistant to independent agent that manages its own workflows.
articles.content:
GitHub发布Copilot桌面应用技术预览版，这是首个以AI Agent驱动开发为核心的专属工作空间。该应用的发布标志着AI编码工具从编辑器辅助角色升级为独立开发伙伴。

新应用支持并行工作流、深度GitHub集成和完整的PR生命周期管理。开发者可以在一个统一界面内完成从代码编写到PR合并的全部流程。

Copilot桌面应用的核心理念是开发者角色转变：从亲自写代码转向监督AI Agent写代码。人类开发者的价值将更多体现在需求理解、架构设计和质量把控上。

该应用支持macOS、Windows和Linux三大平台，将于今年晚些时候正式发布。
articles.content_en:
GitHub released the Copilot desktop app technical preview, the first dedicated workspace centered on AI Agent-driven development. This launch signals AI coding tools graduating from editor assistant role to independent development partner.

The new app supports parallel workflows, deep GitHub integration, and complete PR lifecycle management. Developers can complete the entire process from code writing to PR merging within a unified interface.

The core concept of Copilot desktop app is developer role transformation: from writing code personally to supervising AI Agents writing code. Human developer value will increasingly manifest in requirement understanding, architecture design, and quality control.

The app supports macOS, Windows, and Linux, with official release planned for later this year.

articles.title: AMD砸20亿英镑押注英国AI：苏姿丰在伦敦科技周宣布五年投资计划
articles.title_en: AMD Invests £2 Billion in UK AI: Lisa Su Announces Five-Year Plan at London Tech Week
articles.summary: AMD CEO苏姿丰在伦敦科技周宣布，计划未来五年在英国增加最高20亿英镑投资，用于扩大AI研发、深化与剑桥大学和帝国理工的合作、推进新工厂建设和现有设施升级。此举正值英国积极推动主权AI发展之际，Cosine等本土公司正崛起。AMD选择在英国加码，既是看准欧洲AI市场机遇，也是对英国AI人才池的认可。
articles.summary_en: AMD CEO Lisa Su announced plans to invest up to £2B in the UK over five years for AI R&D expansion, deeper partnerships with Cambridge and Imperial College, and new facilities. The move comes as the UK pushes sovereign AI development, with domestic firms like Cosine rising. AMD's investment signals confidence in the European AI market and UK talent pool.
articles.content:
AMD CEO苏姿丰在伦敦科技周宣布，计划未来五年在英国增加最高20亿英镑投资，用于扩大AI研发、深化与剑桥大学和帝国理工的合作、推进新工厂建设和现有设施升级。

这一投资正值英国积极推动主权AI发展战略之际。Cosine等本土AI公司的崛起展示了英国在AI领域的潜力。

AMD选择在英国加码投资，既是看准欧洲AI市场的广阔机遇，也是对英国AI人才储备和科研实力的认可。伦敦作为全球金融中心的地位也为投资提供了良好环境。

苏姿丰表示，AMD致力于支持英国的AI生态系统建设，期待与本地伙伴开展更深入合作。
articles.content_en:
AMD CEO Lisa Su announced plans to invest up to £2 billion in the UK over five years for AI R&D expansion, deeper partnerships with Cambridge and Imperial College, and new facility construction and existing facility upgrades.

This investment comes as the UK actively promotes sovereign AI development strategy. The rise of domestic AI companies like Cosine demonstrates Britain's potential in the AI field.

AMD's decision to increase UK investment reflects confidence in the European AI market and recognition of the UK's AI talent pool and research strength. London's status as a global financial center also provides a favorable environment.

Lisa Su stated AMD is committed to supporting the UK's AI ecosystem development and looks forward to deeper collaboration with local partners.
key_points: AMD计划五年在英国投资20亿英镑
扩大AI研发和大学合作
支持英国主权AI战略
投资看准欧洲AI市场机遇
key_points_en: AMD plans £2B UK investment over five years
Expanding AI R&D and university partnerships
Investment targets European AI market opportunity
